---
title: "Pull Requests"
date-modified: today
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{python}
import html
import os
from pathlib import Path

import pandas as pd
import requests
import yaml
from IPython.display import HTML, display
from itables import init_notebook_mode, show

API_BASE = "https://api.github.com"
HOST_REPOSITORIES_PATH = Path(".github/host-repositories.yml")


def github_headers() -> dict[str, str]:
	"""Create request headers for GitHub API calls."""
	token = os.getenv("GITHUB_TOKEN") or os.getenv("GH_TOKEN")
	headers = {
		"Accept": "application/vnd.github+json",
		"X-GitHub-Api-Version": "2022-11-28",
	}
	if token:
		headers["Authorization"] = f"Bearer {token}"
	return headers


def read_host_repositories(path: Path) -> list[str]:
	"""Read host repositories from host-repositories.yml."""
	payload = yaml.safe_load(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")) or {}
	hosts = payload.get("hosts", [])
	repositories = [host.get("repository", "").strip() for host in hosts]
	return [repository for repository in repositories if repository]


def summarize_gha_checks(repository: str, commit_sha: str, headers: dict[str, str]) -> str:
	"""Summarize GitHub Actions check-runs for a pull request head commit."""
	response = requests.get(
		f"{API_BASE}/repos/{repository}/commits/{commit_sha}/check-runs",
		headers=headers,
		timeout=30,
	)
	if not response.ok:
		return f"API {response.status_code}"

	check_runs = response.json().get("check_runs", [])
	if not check_runs:
		return "No checks"

	statuses = [run.get("status", "") for run in check_runs]
	completed_runs = [run for run in check_runs if run.get("status") == "completed"]
	conclusions = [run.get("conclusion") for run in completed_runs]

	if any(status != "completed" for status in statuses):
		state = "In progress"
	elif conclusions and all(conclusion in {"success", "neutral", "skipped"} for conclusion in conclusions):
		state = "Passing"
	elif any(conclusion in {"failure", "cancelled", "timed_out", "action_required", "startup_failure"} for conclusion in conclusions):
		state = "Failing"
	else:
		state = "Completed"

	return f"{state} ({len(check_runs)})"


def fetch_open_pull_requests(repository: str, headers: dict[str, str]) -> tuple[list[dict[str, str]], list[str]]:
	"""Fetch open pull requests and selected metadata for one repository."""
	response = requests.get(
		f"{API_BASE}/repos/{repository}/pulls",
		params={"state": "open", "per_page": 100},
		headers=headers,
		timeout=30,
	)
	if not response.ok:
		return [], [f"{repository}: failed to fetch pull requests (HTTP {response.status_code})"]

	pull_requests = response.json()
	rows: list[dict[str, str]] = []
	for pr in pull_requests:
		assignees = ", ".join(user.get("login", "") for user in pr.get("assignees", [])) or "-"
		requested_reviewers = ", ".join(user.get("login", "") for user in pr.get("requested_reviewers", []))
		requested_teams = ", ".join(team.get("name", "") for team in pr.get("requested_teams", []))
		reviewer = ", ".join(filter(None, [requested_reviewers, requested_teams])) or "-"

		rows.append(
			{
				"Repo": repository,
				"PR title": (
					f'<a href="{html.escape(pr.get("html_url", "#"), quote=True)}" '
					f'target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">'
					f'{html.escape(pr.get("title", "(untitled)"))}</a>'
				),
				"Opened by": pr.get("user", {}).get("login", "-"),
				"Assignee": assignees,
				"Reviewer": reviewer,
				"CI checks": summarize_gha_checks(repository, pr.get("head", {}).get("sha", ""), headers),
			}
		)

	return rows, []


headers = github_headers()
repositories = read_host_repositories(HOST_REPOSITORIES_PATH)

all_rows: list[dict[str, str]] = []
errors: list[str] = []

for repository in repositories:
	rows, fetch_errors = fetch_open_pull_requests(repository, headers)
	all_rows.extend(rows)
	errors.extend(fetch_errors)

if not all_rows:
	all_rows = [
		{
			"Repo": "-",
			"PR title": "-",
			"Opened by": "-",
			"Assignee": "-",
			"Reviewer": "-",
			"CI checks": "No open pull requests",
		}
	]

table_df = pd.DataFrame(
	all_rows,
	columns=["Repo", "PR title", "Opened by", "Assignee", "Reviewer", "CI checks"],
)

token_notice = ""
if not (os.getenv("GITHUB_TOKEN") or os.getenv("GH_TOKEN")):
	token_notice = (
		"<p><strong>Note:</strong> Rendering without a GitHub token may be rate limited.</p>"
	)

error_html = ""
if errors:
	joined = "".join(f"<li>{item}</li>" for item in errors)
	error_html = f"<details><summary>API warnings</summary><ul>{joined}</ul></details>"

if token_notice or error_html:
	display(HTML(f"{token_notice}{error_html}"))

init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=True)
show(
	table_df,
	escape=False,
	searching=True,
	paging=True,
	pageLength=25,
	order=[[0, "asc"]],
	column_filters="header",
	classes=["display", "compact", "stripe", "hover"],
)
```
